'''Mark Griskey''' is a composer and orchestra director who composed the soundtrack for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' and [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II|its sequel]] as well as contributed to games like [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'']], ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'', and ''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]''.
